title: PipelineFailedPayload
description: Payload for eventforge.pipeline.failed — terminal failure after retries exhausted or DLQ delivery.

stage.description: Pipeline stage that failed (JobStageName value, e.g. ingestion, embedding).

failed_event_id.description: event_id of the inbound event that could not be processed.

failed_detail_type.description: detail_type of the inbound event that failed.

source_queue.description: Worker queue the message was redriven from, if known.

receive_count.description: Approximate SQS receive count when failure was recorded, if available.
